description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Standard Activity Staking Reward Distribution occurs linearly over the course of each month. The monthly payout from the Standard Activity Staking Rewards Buffer (SASRB) is equal to the lesser of (1) 20% of Step 4 Capital, or (2) 15% of the SASRB, with a minimum floor of 5% of the SASRB.

In periods of high profitability, funds build up in the Standard Activity Staking Rewards Buffer. Then in periods of low profitability these funds are paid out from the Standard Activity Staking Rewards Buffer, ensuring that there is a continued incentive for involvement in governance even in periods of low profitability to maintain security.
description: Restructures the TMF waterfall across four steps (Security and Maintenance, Aggregate Backstop Capital growth, Smart Burn Engine with split between SKY rewards / USDS rewards / burn, and Staking Rewards). Retires the Net Revenue Ratio and activity-based staking reward tiers.
